response.justification: Bogdan has extensive full-stack experience and a strong background in geospatial systems through GISCollective, which aligns with the role’s domain, but lacks direct experience with C++ or Rust in production routing/data pipelines, and his work has primarily used JavaScript/TypeScript/DLang — raising concerns about his readiness for the core C++-centric responsibilities.
strengths: Proven experience in geospatial data platforms via open-source GISCollective
Strong track record in building scalable, low-latency systems with DLang and async I/O
Demonstrated ability to learn and contribute across diverse tech stacks and domains
concerns: No visible commercial C++ or Rust experience in routing, navigation, or geospatial tiling
Primary language focus is JavaScript/TypeScript/DLang, not the required C++ core
Limited evidence of distributed systems work with fault tolerance or consistency guarantees
